name: DZT Germany Tourism
description: Search German tourism data: POIs, events, trails, and entity details (Deutsche Zentrale fuer Tourismus via One.Intelligence, free)

tools.name: get_pois_by_criteria
tools.description: Search permanent Points of Interest in Germany (museums, castles, restaurants, landmarks)

tools.name: get_events_by_criteria
tools.description: Search upcoming tourist events in Germany (festivals, tours, wine tastings, markets)

tools.name: get_trails_by_criteria
tools.description: Search hiking trails, cycling routes and walking tours in Germany

tools.name: get_entity_details
tools.description: Get full details for a tourism entity by URI (from previous search results)

author: freddy-schuetz
